list.name: namespace
list.label: Namespace
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(target,'/',1) AS __value FROM logs WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY __value

list.name: pod
list.label: Pod
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(target,'/',2) AS __value FROM logs WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) ORDER BY __value

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS lines FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod)) AND ('All' IN ($level) OR level IN ($level)) AND ('${search}' = '' OR message ~* '${search}')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS errors FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND level='error' AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS warnings FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND level='warning' AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fatals FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND level='fatal' AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT target) AS pods FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace))

SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 minute', time) AS time, level AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod)) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT split_part(target,'/',1) AS namespace, split_part(target,'/',2) AS pod, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level='info') AS info, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level='warning') AS warn, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level='error') AS error, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level='fatal') AS fatal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT level, LEFT(regexp_replace(message, '[0-9a-f]{8,}', '<id>', 'g'), 120) AS pattern, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND level IN ('error','fatal','warning') AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT time, level, target, message AS body FROM logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('All' IN ($namespace) OR split_part(target,'/',1) IN ($namespace)) AND ('All' IN ($pod) OR split_part(target,'/',2) IN ($pod)) AND ('All' IN ($level) OR level IN ($level)) AND ('${search}' = '' OR message ~* '${search}') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500
